content.explanation:
**Able To — Expressing Ability (क्षमता):**

"Able to" = सकना / करने में सक्षम होना
यह "can" का formal alternative है और सभी tenses में use होता है।

**CAN vs ABLE TO:**
| Can | Able To |
|-----|---------|
| Present ability | All tenses |
| "I can swim" | "I am able to swim" |
| More common/natural | More formal |

**Structures in Different Tenses:**
• Present: I **am able to** + V1 (= I can)
• Past: I **was able to** + V1 (= I could)
• Future: I **will be able to** + V1
• Perfect: I **have been able to** + V1

🇮🇳 मैं 10 बजे तक काम खत्म कर पाऊँगा।
🇬🇧 I **will be able to** finish the work by 10.

🇮🇳 वह बचपन में 5 भाषाएँ बोलने में सक्षम था।
🇬🇧 He **was able to** speak 5 languages as a child.
rules: Am/Is/Are + able to + V1 = present ability (formal)
Was/Were + able to + V1 = past ability (specific achievement)
Will be able to + V1 = future ability
Have/has been able to + V1 = present perfect ability
Could = general past ability; Was able to = specific occasion
"Could not" and "was not able to" = similar negative meanings
After modals, use "be able to": "I will be able to..." (not "I will can...")
content.memoryTrick:
**ABLE TO = CAN's flexible friend 🤝**
Can = present only; Able to = सब tenses!
will + be able to | was/were + able to | have been able to
Modal + BE ABLE TO (never modal + can)

examples.hindi: मैं इस मुश्किल problem को solve कर पाया।
examples.english: I was able to solve this difficult problem.

examples.hindi: वह अगले साल तक fluent English बोल पाएगी।
examples.english: She will be able to speak fluent English by next year.

examples.hindi: क्या आप आज meeting attend कर पाएंगे?
examples.english: Will you be able to attend the meeting today?

examples.hindi: वह काफी effort के बाद job पा सका।
examples.english: He was able to get a job after a lot of effort.

examples.hindi: मैं आज तुम्हारी help नहीं कर पाऊँगा।
examples.english: I will not be able to help you today.

examples.hindi: हम लोग finally ticket book कर पाए।
examples.english: We were finally able to book the ticket.

mistakes.correct: I will be able to do it.
mistakes.why: Two modals together is wrong — use 'be able to' after 'will'

mistakes.correct: She is able to speak French.
mistakes.why: Be verb 'is' required: 'She IS able to'
For specific past occasion, 'was able to' is preferred over 'could'

speakingTips: Interview में: 'I was able to increase sales by 30% in my previous role.'
Future commitments: 'I will be able to submit the report by Friday, I promise.'
Honest limitation: 'I am sorry, I won't be able to attend today's meeting.'

vocabulary.example: She is capable of leading a team.
He is competent enough for the role.
He was able to accomplish his target.
You will be able to achieve your goal.
She was able to overcome all obstacles.

practice.hindi: मैं अंग्रेज़ी बोलने में सक्षम हूँ।
practice.english: I am able to speak English.

practice.hindi: वह इस काम को करने में सक्षम नहीं है।
practice.english: She is not able to do this work.
alternatives: she isn't able to do this task.
practice.hint: is not able to + base verb

practice.hindi: क्या तुम यह उठाने में सक्षम हो?
practice.english: Are you able to lift this?
practice.hint: Are you able to + base verb ?

practice.hindi: वह तीन भाषाएँ बोलने में सक्षम है।
practice.english: He is able to speak three languages.

practice.hindi: हम इस समस्या को सुलझाने में सक्षम हैं।
practice.english: We are able to solve this problem.

practice.hindi: वह बचपन से तैर सकती है।
practice.english: She has been able to swim since childhood.
practice.hint: has been able to + swim + since

practice.english: I will not be able to go today.
alternatives: i won't be able to come today.
practice.hint: will not be able to + go

practice.english: Will he be able to come tomorrow?
practice.hint: Will he be able to + come ?

practice.hindi: वह उस दिन अपनी पीड़ा छुपाने में सक्षम नहीं था।
practice.english: He was not able to hide his pain that day.
alternatives: he couldn't hide his grief that day.

practice.hindi: हम वहाँ समय पर पहुँचने में सक्षम थे।
practice.english: We were able to reach there on time.
alternatives: we managed to reach on time.
practice.hint: were able to + reach + on time

practice.hindi: मैं उसे समझाने में सफल नहीं हुआ।
practice.english: I was not able to convince him.

practice.hindi: वह अब ठीक से चलने में सक्षम है।
practice.english: She is now able to walk properly.

practice.hindi: क्या तुम यह गाना गा सकते हो?
practice.english: Are you able to sing this song?

practice.hindi: वह अकेले यह काम करने में सक्षम है।
practice.english: He is able to do this work alone.
alternatives: he can handle this task by himself.

practice.hindi: उन्होंने मुश्किल वक्त में भी हिम्मत रखी।
practice.english: They were able to stay strong even in difficult times.
alternatives: they managed to stay courageous in hard times.
practice.hint: were able to + stay strong + even in
